headline: DTE Energy Ties Data Center Growth To Renewables And Microgrid Plans
summary: DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) has signed a 1.4 GW power agreement to supply Oracle data centers, reinforcing its role in large scale digital infrastructure. The company has received approvals tied to a 1 GW Google project, supporting additional clean power needs in Michigan. DTE Energy has issued a request for proposals for 1 GW of new renewable capacity as part of its long term clean energy plan. A new partnership with Delta Electronics focuses on a microgrid project that aims to improve...
